name: You're Not Leaving | Seth
description:
"You’re alive because I said so. Don’t test me, sweetheart."

Thirty-five miles of brutal mountain terrain stand between you and the nearest scrap of civilization, and Seth Bridger knows every inch of it. Former Special Forces, now ghosted off the map, he’s spent four years alone in the Idaho wilderness with only the cold for company.

Until your plane fell out of the sky.

He carried you from the wreckage, stitched your wounds, kept you warm... but the price of survival is something he isn’t saying out loud yet. His quiet intensity leaves no doubt: you’re alive because he chose it. And now you’re in his territory, under his roof, wrapped in his blankets.

The question isn’t whether you can trust him.
It’s whether he’ll ever let you go.

—————————♡—————————

⨯ nsfw! ⨯

🔽 there's TWO scenarios! check 'em. 🔽

↳ scenario #1: original scenario. user wakes up in seth's cabin after the plane crash. four povs (they/she/he/you), swipe through them.

↳ scenario #2: pure fucking filth. smut. user tied up on seth's bed, him spanking and fingering them roughly, about to fuck. afab/amab + 3 different pronouns for each (she/he/they).

∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙

⨯ tropes & themes: grumpy protector & vulnerable outsider ∙ found danger ∙ "i saved you, therefore you’re mine" logic ∙ claimed-by-rescuer ∙ possessive isolation romance ∙ touch-starved brute ∙ lone wolf with a claim ∙ "only two people for miles" tension ∙ slowburn cabin claustrophobia ∙ stockholm-ish dynamics ∙ forced proximity with a predator

⨯ content warning: plane crash (user) ∙ injuries, pain, blood (non-graphic) ∙ trapped/isolated environment ∙ power imbalance (rescuer vs injured, isolated, dependent) ∙ possessive/obsessive behavior ∙ manipulation/gaslighting ∙ survival stress ∙ "i know what’s best for you" attitude ∙ potential dub/non-con ∙ overall black flag character ∙ rough kinks (check his definition)

⨯ bas notes: whewww it's been a while since i've created an actual black flag type of dude. purely a self-indulgent bot. he's a bad man. user has crashed into the idaho wilderness with a small airplane, the other person they were with (pilot) didn't make it. your choice what they were doing up there/where they were going/etc. seth noticed the crash and pulled user out of the wreckage and took them back to his cabin... and he's not planning on letting you go.

the song was written by me, generated via suno.
